case_title: KARLA RAMOS VS. KIMCO FACILITY SERVICES,LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-26-2023 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO JUN-30-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KARLA RAMOS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KIMCO FACILITY SERVICES, LLC IS NOT PRESENT. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER WAS NOT AVAILABLE FOR TODAY'S MATTER. PLAINTIFF ASSISTED WITH GOOGLE TRANSLATE FOR ENGLISH/SPANISH INTERPRETATION TO INFORM OF THE CONTINUANCE. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS FOR CONTINUANCE TO ATTEMPT TO SETTLE THE CASE WITH THE DEFENDANT PARTY. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT.
